label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. The problem gives me several time slots where Thomas was seen doing different things, and I need to find the time when he wasn't accounted for, but before the football field closes at 9pm. First, let me list out all the times Thomas was seen: 1. Thomas woke up at 8am. That's just a starting point, not an activity with a duration. 2. David saw Thomas fixing their computer at the electronic store from 8am to 10am. So 8-10 AM. 3. Jennifer saw him buying lunch at the deli from 10am to 12pm. That's 10 AM to 12 PM (noon). 4. Lisa saw him walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. So 12 PM to 2 PM. 5. Sarah saw him buying a phone at the electronics store from 2pm to 5pm. That's 2 PM to 5 PM. 6. Kimberly saw him buying a bike at the bike shop from 6pm to 9pm. 6 PM to 9 PM. The football field was closed after 9pm, so Thomas had to go before that. Now, let's look at the timeline: - 8am to 10am: at electronic store - 10am to 12pm: at deli - 12pm to 2pm: walking
